description: In this tutorial, learn how to create an on-chain game on Solana in just 10 minutes. The process involves setting up an anchor program, JavaScript client, and Unity client, allowing for real-time interactions within the game. Users can log in, chop trees, and manage their in-game assets like NFTs and tokens efficiently.
topic_summary: Creating an on-chain game on Solana, including setting up clients and deploying a program. Demonstrates real-time interactions and game mechanics like chopping trees and managing energy and tokens [t=0:24 - t=3:24].
